bugs.desc: O(n^2) membership scan on a list; use a set for seen
dict(pairs) silently keeps LAST duplicate key; earlier values lost without warning
size==0 raises/ infinite intent; no guard for size<=0
negative n silently returns wrong slice; not validated
not a deep merge: nested dicts overwritten instead of merged
mutates input dict 'a' in place (side effect)
n>len returns all silently; n negative returns wrong slice; no guard
full sort O(n log n) for top-n; heapq.nlargest intended for large n
divides by n (population); sample variance needs n-1; also crashes on empty
strings are iterable -> split into chars; only flattens one level
KeyError: groups[k] accessed before init; needs setdefault/defaultdict
sampling WITH replacement (random.choice repeats); 'sample' implies without replacement
sorting by random key is a biased/improper shuffle; use random.shuffle
